mapper.select: WITH latest_congestion AS ( SELECT tc.intersection_id, tc.vehicle_count, tc.congestion_level, TO_CHAR(tc.recorded_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS congestion_recorded_at FROM traffic_congestion tc WHERE tc.intersection_id = #{intersectionId} ORDER BY tc.recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1 ), latest_sensor AS ( SELECT s.equipment_id, s.temperature, s.vibration, s.risk_score, s.recorded_at FROM sensor_log s JOIN equipment e ON s.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE e.intersection_id = #{intersectionId} ORDER BY s.recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT i.intersection_id, i.name AS intersection_name, CAST(i.latitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS latitude, CAST(i.longitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS longitude, COALESCE((SELECT vehicle_count FROM latest_congestion), 0) AS vehicle_count, COALESCE((SELECT congestion_level FROM latest_congestion), 'UNKNOWN') AS congestion_level, COALESCE((SELECT congestion_recorded_at FROM latest_congestion), '-') AS congestion_recorded_at, COALESCE((SELECT temperature FROM latest_sensor), 0) AS temperature, COALESCE((SELECT vibration FROM latest_sensor), 0) AS vibration, COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM latest_sensor), 0) AS risk_score FROM intersection i WHERE i.intersection_id = #{intersectionId}

SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_type, e.status, COALESCE(TO_CHAR(e.installation_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') AS installation_date FROM equipment e WHERE e.intersection_id = #{intersectionId} ORDER BY e.equipment_id

SELECT s.control_id, s.control_type, COALESCE(s.control_reason, '-') AS control_reason, TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM signal_control_log s WHERE s.intersection_id = #{intersectionId} ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT m.ticket_id, m.equipment_id, m.repair_status, COALESCE(m.reported_by, '-') AS reported_by, TO_CHAR(m.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at, COALESCE(TO_CHAR(m.resolved_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '-') AS resolved_at FROM maintenance_log m JOIN equipment e ON m.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE e.intersection_id = #{intersectionId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
